use_codes.desc: PRODUCT IS APPROVED FOR THE TOPICAL TREATMENT OF TINEA PEDIS

indications.text:
ERTACZO® cream, 2%, is indicated for the topical treatment of interdigital tinea pedis in immunocompetent adult and
pediatric patients 12 years of age and older caused by Trichophyton rubrum, Trichophyton mentagrophytes, and
Epidermophyton floccosum.
